hooks.command: cd /Users/tamir/Desktop/cyborg-kpi && TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') && git add index.html CLAUDE.md DESIGN.md SKILLS.md .claude/ 2>/dev/null; if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then git commit -m "chore: auto-save [$TIMESTAMP] – vor Kontext-Reset" 2>/dev/null; fi; echo "[$TIMESTAMP] PreCompact: auto-save" >> /Users/tamir/Desktop/cyborg-kpi/.claude/session-log.txt 2>/dev/null; true
